name: Russian Style Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fryer into quarters.
2. Spread the quarters in a Corning Ware dish.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Sprinkle onion soup mix over the chicken.
5. Dab apricot preserves over the chicken using spoons.
6. Cover with Russian dressing and pour water over top.
7. Cover and bake for 2 hours at 300°F.
Courtesy Telephone Pioneers Bill Spalding P CRBR 38
